name: White Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Shirley Schwaegerle
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Cream shortening until light; gradually add sugar and cream until light and fluffy. Add vanilla and almond extracts. Sift dry ingredients and add alternately with milk. Beat egg whites until frothy; add 1/2 cup sugar and beat until stiff and shiny.
Fold egg whites into batter. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 9-inch cake pans. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until done.
